scope: AI-005/AI-008 persisted learner context: current-skill mastery/confidence/status, valid deterministic active misconception tags, goals/preferences, latest stored weekly summary, and a bounded selected owner-active thread tail.

policy.untrustedRole: All stored learner/profile/summary/chat strings are redacted and serialized inside one user-role UNTRUSTED_CONTEXT_DATA JSON envelope; stored assistant text is never replayed as an assistant-role instruction.
policy.learnerMessageBoundary: The current learner message is sanitized once before provider transmission, request hashing, and chat persistence. The UI replaces optimistic text with the server-accepted sanitized value and discloses redaction.
policy.credentialOutcomeCAS: Provider health writes require the active owner row plus keyVersion and an exact microsecond updated_at token. Success never assigns active status, so concurrent disable/replacement/admin validation wins.
exclusions: hidden tests, reference answers, and grading keys

verification.database: fresh disposable PostgreSQL 17; migrations applied twice
fresh disposable PostgreSQL 17; migrations applied twice
races: unchanged success applies without status transition
unchanged authentication failure applies invalid status

verification.command: npm.cmd run security:secrets && npm.cmd run security:encoding
npm.cmd run lint && npm.cmd run typecheck
provider-operation idempotency follow-up: 7 focused files / 49 tests plus 1 PostgreSQL file / 3 tests
verification.notes: Validates the final tutor route/UI revisions, durable request replay, and migrations through 0025 applied twice.

remainingLimitations: There is no dedicated versioned per-thread/per-skill summary-generation worker. The latest already-stored weekly-summary text may be stale or broad; if absent, the category is omitted.
The 40-row deterministic evidence window is deliberately bounded; very old misconception history outside that window is not sent to a provider.
No live provider call was made. Offline contract evidence does not prove production-model teaching quality.
The complete shared PostgreSQL suite after the CAS/idempotency follow-ups is owned by the root release gate; the affected PostgreSQL files passed in fresh isolated runs.
Deployed NUC/Cloudflare browser E2E and manual device/assistive-technology validation remain release-level external checks.
